vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không bao giờ thỏa mãn
vocab.example: As a child, I had an insatiable curiosity about insects, which led to my hobby of bug collecting.

vocab.meaning: cách thức/phương tiện để giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: Painting served as a vital creative outlet for me during my primary school years.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: I spent a significant portion of my formative years building intricate Lego structures.

vocab.meaning: sự quan tâm nồng nhiệt/mãnh liệt
vocab.example: I developed a fervent interest in star-gazing after my father bought me a telescope for my birthday.

vocab.meaning: một thú vui kỳ quặc, hồn nhiên
vocab.example: While other kids played football, my whimsical pursuit was trying to map out the 'secret passages' in our garden.
Learning the violin as a young boy had a profound impact on my discipline and patience.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng cảm giác/ý thức về...
vocab.example: Joining the local scouts fostered a sense of camaraderie and adventure in me from a young age.

vocab.meaning: sở thích nhất thời, mau đến mau đi
vocab.example: I had a fleeting interest in stamp collecting, but it was soon replaced by a passion for comic books.
Reading was my favorite solitary pastime; I could get lost in a story for hours on end.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng phong phú/sống động
vocab.example: My vivid imagination allowed me to turn simple doll-playing into complex theatrical dramas.
